race.comment: BORN FEARLESS (5) has recorded five minor placings from nine runs this preparation. Finished 5 lengths from the winner in second at the latest outing over 1200m at Roma. Suitably placed so anticipating another big run. HARD TO DISMISS (12) finished 3.7 lengths back from the winner last start at Rockhampton and is down in weight this time. Rates among the leading chances. TIPSY TIGER (11) has been good in placing in both starts off a spell. Should be reaching peak fitness now so could break through. BETTA THAN PRESLEY (4) is yet to miss a drum in five attempts over this trip and must be included in calculations.
